messages.content: The correct answer is: Ensure your review question defines the scope of your review and the terms used.

A researcher is at the planning stages of her project. She would like to present her ideas to other researchers internationally so that she can obtain feedback, build networks, modify ideas and develop her research. What would be the quickest and most effective way for her to do this?


A radio chat show

A book chapter

Her university website

An academic networking site

An academic networking site would be the quickest and most effective way for the researcher to present her ideas to other researchers internationally, obtain feedback, build networks, modify ideas, and develop her research.

You have two hours to complete this activity before your session times out.
A researcher is at the planning stages of her project. She would like to present her ideas to other researchers internationally so that she can obtain feedback, build networks, modify ideas and develop her research. What would be the quickest and most effective way for her to do this?


A radio chat show

A book chapter

Her university website

An academic networking site
A researcher has been asked to contribute to an edited collection of scientific chapters. What should he do?


Write in the first person and include plenty of personal opinion

Follow all guidelines and ensure that his writing is based on sound methodology

Avoid jargon to ensure his writing can be easily understood by a lay audience

Ignore guidelines so that his writing is unique and individual

The quickest and most effective way for the researcher to present her ideas to other researchers internationally, obtain feedback, build networks, modify ideas, and develop her research would be to use an academic networking site.

Regarding the second question, the researcher should follow all guidelines and ensure that his writing is based on sound methodology when contributing to an edited collection of scientific chapters.

What is the term given to peer-reviewed journal articles or conference proceedings that are made publicly available for free?


Open science

Open access

Linked data

Open cloud
The term given to peer-reviewed journal articles or conference proceedings that are made publicly available for free is "open access."

A researcher has been asked to contribute to an edited collection of scientific chapters. What should he do?


Write in the first person and include plenty of personal opinion

Follow all guidelines and ensure that his writing is based on sound methodology

Avoid jargon to ensure his writing can be easily understood by a lay audience

Ignore guidelines so that his writing is unique and individual
The researcher should follow all guidelines and ensure that his writing is based on sound methodology when contributing to an edited collection of scientific chapters.
The correct answer is: Follow all guidelines and ensure that his writing is based on sound methodology.
The correct answer is: Register for a unique ORCID identifier and ensure that it is attached to all their research outputs.
The correct answer is: How supervision is arranged will vary, but in many cases, candidates work with more than one supervisor.

A key skill in enhancing your intercultural competence is:


Researching into the different cultural backgrounds of supervisors and peers

Avoiding making assumptions

Learning a new language

Asking questions about people's backgrounds and showing an interest in other languages
The correct answer is: Avoiding making assumptions.

Is it advisable to search for literature using more than one database?


No, one relevant database is enough and helps to focus your search better

Yes, provided that the databases do not cover any of the same topics

No, you will just get repetition in your search results

Yes, there might be relevant literature that is indexed in one database but not another
The correct answer is: Yes, there might be relevant literature that is indexed in one database but not another.

How can you identify additional literature not found in an electronic database?


Identify the most popular results from Google and other search engines

Look through reference lists in books or articles and search the indexes of relevant journals

Look through journals from outside your field to find potentially relevant articles

Expand the scope of your review question to encompass more literature
The correct answer is: Look through reference lists in books or articles and search the indexes of relevant journals.

Why is it important to keep a record of the search strategy for your literature review?


So that you do not repeat searches or omit to run searches that are required

So that you make sure you are using the same strategy as other researchers

So that you can repeat all your searches at the end of your review
The correct answer is: So that you do not repeat searches or omit to run searches that are required.

A researcher is interested in the way that images communicate a message through signs, the relationship between signs and patterns of symbolism. What would be an appropriate data analysis method?


Acoustic analysis

Video interaction analysis

Visual semiotics

Cluster analysis
An appropriate data analysis method for studying the relationship between signs and patterns of symbolism in images would be Visual semiotics.

A researcher in international development is interested in analysing similarities, differences and patterns across two or more countries. What would be an appropriate data analysis method for this research?


Geospatial analysis

Discourse analysis

Sentiment analysis

Comparative case study analysis

An appropriate data analysis method for analysing similarities, differences, and patterns across two or more countries in the context of international development would be Comparative case study analysis.

What would be an appropriate software package for extracting hidden information in data sets to discover patterns, relationships and trends?


WASP software for the recording, display and analysis of speech

Weka open source software for data mining tasks

SPSS software for advanced statistical analysis
Weka open source software for data mining tasks would be an appropriate software package for extracting hidden information in data sets to discover patterns, relationships, and trends.
